# py-sse

> 

- [serve](/serve): internal_parse_request, body, signals, set_cookie, internal_serialize_cookie, internal_cookie_headers, create_relay, create_signer, static, create_app, serve
- [sse](/sse): patch_elements, patch_signals, remove_signals, execute_script
